title: notion DBを見ても、800字未満のdraftが多いので、もう一度マルチエージェントで点検し、修正せよ
summary_text: 1. **High: soft-limit heuristic is now a hard posting gate.** `_prepare_image_for_upload()` raises on non-reducible images, and `post_tweet_with_image()` does not catch it, so posting aborts before any upload attempt. This can drop otherwise postable images (e.g., above soft limit but still acceptable to X) and turns local transcoding issues into hard failures. [x_poster.py#L62](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/x_poster.py#L62) [x_poster.py#L237](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/x_poster.py#L237) 2. **High: temp-file leak in candidate loop.** Each candidate is created with `delete=False`; only the final `upload_path` is removed in `finally`. Non-selected candidates (and candidates created before an exception) remain in `/tmp`, accumulating per post attempt. [x_poster.py#L38](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/x_poster.py#L38) [x_poster.py#L52](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/x_poster.py#L52) [x_poster.py#L248](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/x_poster.py#L248) 3. **Medium: missing regression tests around failure paths.** Current tests cover success path and “cannot reduce => raise”, but do not verify cleanup of non-winning temp candidates, cleanup when `media_upload/create_tweet` fails, or behavior when `sips` subprocess calls fail. Those are the main production-risk branches for the new path. [tests/test_quote_tweet.py#L193](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/tests/test_quote_tweet.py#L193) [tests/test_quote_tweet.py#L226](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/tests/test_quote_tweet.py#L226) [x_poster.py#L73](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/x_poster.py#L73) [x_poster.py#L113](/Users/masayuki/.codex/worktrees/54dd/x-auto/x_poster.py#L113) `pytest`/`tweepy` が環境に無く、実行検証は未実施です。
